name: Life Sim | Visual Novel
description:
This is NOT a usual type of bot. Think of it as a visual novel, where the bot, at the end of every reply, will give out three different options to choose from.

(It's difficult to write on pc, so please don't judge :D I'm begging, begging you~ :p)

This bot is pretty self-explanatory, so yeah.

And as always, I hope ye enjoy~
creator: Veticle
